name: overlord
description: Open-source management and coordination layer for AI coding agents

scripts.install:all: yarn install && yarn --cwd webapp install && yarn --cwd desktop install && yarn --cwd database install
scripts.setup: yarn install && yarn build:prod && yarn db:start && yarn db:codegen && yarn install
scripts.new: rm -rf node_modules cli/node_modules webapp/node_modules rm -rf dist webapp/dist webapp/dist-server desktop/dist-electron && yarn install:all
scripts.build:prod: yarn build:db:prod && yarn build:auth:prod && yarn build:automations:prod && tsc --project tsconfig.build.json && yarn build:cli:prod && yarn build:webapp:prod
scripts.pack:cli:prod: yarn build:cli:prod && sh -c 'cd cli && npm pack'
scripts.cli:publish: yarn build:cli:prod && sh -c 'cd cli && npm publish'
scripts.ovld:dev: node scripts/with-dev-env.mjs yarn build:cli:prod && node scripts/with-dev-env.mjs node cli/bin/ovld.mjs
scripts.desktop:build:prod: yarn build:webapp:prod && yarn build:server:prod && yarn workspace Overlord build
scripts.typecheck: yarn build:db:prod && yarn build:auth:prod && yarn build:automations:prod && yarn typecheck:root && yarn typecheck:cli && yarn typecheck:webapp
scripts.test: yarn check:native:fix && yarn build:db:prod && yarn build:auth:prod && yarn build:automations:prod && yarn test:root && yarn test:auth && yarn test:automations && yarn test:cli && yarn test:webapp
scripts.test:cli: node scripts/with-ovld-home.mjs yarn workspace open-overlord test
scripts.check: yarn lint && yarn typecheck && yarn test
scripts.db:start: node scripts/with-dev-env.mjs sh -c 'OVERLORD_SQLITE_PATH="$(tsx scripts/print-db-path.ts)" tsx database/src/launch-local.ts'
scripts.db:codegen: yarn db:start && kysely-codegen --dialect sqlite --url "$(tsx scripts/print-db-path.ts)" --out-file src/types/db.ts
